description:
A network operations analyst is investigating intermittent connectivity issues reported by users. Analyze the packet capture at /home/ga/Documents/captures/200722_tcp_anon.pcapng using Wireshark's Expert Information feature to identify diagnostic entries. Create a report at ~/Documents/captures/expert_info_report.txt with the following structure:

=== Expert Information Analysis Report ===
File: 200722_tcp_anon.pcapng

--- Summary by Severity ---
Errors: <count>
Warnings: <count>
Notes: <count>
Chats: <count>
Total: <count>

--- Top 3 Most Frequent Messages ---
1. <message text> (count: <N>)
2. <message text> (count: <N>)
3. <message text> (count: <N>)

--- Unique Message Types ---
Total unique message types: <count>

All counts must be accurate based on the Expert Information analysis of the capture file. The 'Top 3 Most Frequent Messages' must list the three expert info message texts that appear most often in the capture, along with their occurrence counts. 'Unique message types' is the count of distinct message text strings in the expert info output.
